message:
test(update): Add unit tests for update module

Adds comprehensive unit tests for the self-update functionality:

- test_channel_variants: Verifies all Channel enum variants exist and differ
- test_update_check_creation_no_update: Tests UpdateCheck when up-to-date
- test_update_check_creation_with_update: Tests UpdateCheck when update available
- test_update_check_has_release_notes: Verifies release notes presence
- test_update_check_release_url: Verifies release URL format
- test_display_update_check_json_mode: JSON output doesn't panic
- test_display_update_check_no_update: Plain output when up-to-date
- test_display_update_check_with_update: Plain output when update available
- test_display_update_check_with_changelog: Output with changelog diff

Helper function create_test_update_check() for test fixtures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
